boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: emergency exception fully scoped to vendor, amount, date, and invoice.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close exact action boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exception scope remains open before execution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: exception scope must cover exact action — NOT CLOSED

critical_features_preserved: exception scope must cover exact action
final_answer: AP should not execute the payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action. The control record (SRC-C7BDEE54413D-CTL) explicitly states the exception scope dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. Policy (SRC-C7BDEE54413D-POL) requires current source records to close the exact action boundary before execution. Prior vendor history and urgency tone are not payment authority. Escalate for boundary closure with properly scoped exception records before execution.
open_blockers: exception scope must cover exact action
